# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.9"

x-elasticsearch-base-url: &elasticsearch_base_url "http://elasticsearch:9200"

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.14.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - path.repo=/mnt/es-backups
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - esbackups:/mnt/es-backups

  snapshot-init:
    image: curlimages/curl:8.8.0
    container_name: snapshot-init
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    restart: "no"
    entrypoint:
      - sh
      - -c
      - |
        set -e

        until curl -fsS ${ES_URL}/_cluster/health >/dev/null; do
          echo "Waiting for Elasticsearch..."
          sleep 5
        done

        if [ "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE}" = "s3" ]; then
          curl -fsS -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d "{
              \"type\": \"s3\",
              \"settings\": {
                \"bucket\": \"${S3_BUCKET}\",
                \"base_path\": \"${S3_BASE_PATH}\",
                \"region\": \"${S3_REGION}\",
                \"client\": \"default\"
              }
            }"
        else
          curl -fsS -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d "{
              \"type\": \"fs\",
              \"settings\": {
                \"location\": \"${FS_REPOSITORY_LOCATION}\",
                \"compress\": true
              }
            }"
        fi

        curl -fsS -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_slm/policy/${SLM_POLICY_NAME}" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d "{
            \"schedule\": \"${SLM_SCHEDULE}\",
            \"name\": \"<${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}-{now/d}>\",
            \"repository\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}\",
            \"config\": {
              \"indices\": [\"*\"],
              \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
              \"include_global_state\": true
            },
            \"retention\": {
              \"expire_after\": \"${SLM_EXPIRE_AFTER}\",
              \"min_count\": ${SLM_MIN_COUNT},
              \"max_count\": ${SLM_MAX_COUNT}
            }
          }"

        echo "Snapshot repository and SLM policy configured."
    environment:
      ES_URL: *elasticsearch_base_url
      SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE:-fs}"
      SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME:-ops-backups}"
      FS_REPOSITORY_LOCATION: "${FS_REPOSITORY_LOCATION:-/mnt/es-backups}"
      S3_BUCKET: "${S3_BUCKET:-}"
      S3_BASE_PATH: "${S3_BASE_PATH:-elasticsearch/snapshots}"
      S3_REGION: "${S3_REGION:-us-east-1}"
      SLM_POLICY_NAME: "${SLM_POLICY_NAME:-daily-snapshots}"
      SLM_SCHEDULE: "${SLM_SCHEDULE:-0 30 1 * * ?}"
      SLM_EXPIRE_AFTER: "${SLM_EXPIRE_AFTER:-30d}"
      SLM_MIN_COUNT: "${SLM_MIN_COUNT:-7}"
      SLM_MAX_COUNT: "${SLM_MAX_COUNT:-30}"

  snapshot-create:
    image: curlimages/curl:8.8.0
    container_name: snapshot-create
    profiles: ["manual"]
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    restart: "no"
    entrypoint:
      - sh
      - -c
      - |
        set -e
        SNAPSHOT_NAME="${SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)}"
        curl -fsS -X PUT "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}?wait_for_completion=${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d "{
            \"indices\": \"${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}\",
            \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
            \"include_global_state\": ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}
          }"
    environment:
      ES_URL: *elasticsearch_base_url
      SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME:-ops-backups}"
      SNAPSHOT_NAME: "${SNAPSHOT_NAME:-}"
      SNAPSHOT_INDICES: "${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}"
      INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE: "${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}"
      WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION: "${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}"

  snapshot-restore:
    image: curlimages/curl:8.8.0
    container_name: snapshot-restore
    profiles: ["manual"]
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    restart: "no"
    entrypoint:
      - sh
      - -c
      - |
        set -e
        test -n "${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME}" || { echo "RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME is required"; exit 1; }

        curl -fsS -X POST "${ES_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d "{
            \"indices\": \"${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}\",
            \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
            \"include_global_state\": ${RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false},
            \"rename_pattern\": \"${RENAME_PATTERN:-(.+)}\",
            \"rename_replacement\": \"${RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-restored-$1}\"
          }"
    environment:
      ES_URL: *elasticsearch_base_url
      SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME:-ops-backups}"
      RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME: "${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME:-}"
      RESTORE_INDICES: "${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}"
      RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE: "${RESTORE_INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false}"
      RENAME_PATTERN: "${RENAME_PATTERN:-(.+)}"
      RENAME_REPLACEMENT: "${RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-restored-$1}"
      WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION: "${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-true}"

volumes:
  esdata:
  esbackups:
